productDisplayName: Levis Men Pack of 3 Casual Socks
description: Pack of three pairs of diamond pattern socks With a supportive Fit and crafted from soft cotton, these socks from Levi's make a great buy. And what better way to enhance your comfort level three-fold than with this tri-pack of diamond pattern socks in navy blue, brown and grey ! Made of soft cotton for a secure fit and exemplary comfort Spandex in welt for enhanced grip Arch support for good grip and a customised fit Cushioned foot-bed for absolute shock absorption and enhanced comfort Breathable mesh sole Softly elasticated broad welt to ensure a soft grip Sock care Machine wash in warm water below 40 degrees using a mild detergent Use non-chlorine bleach if needed Tumble dry low in a delicate cycle Do not iron
